nasb.text: But of Zion it shall be said, “This one and that one were born in her”; And the Most High Himself will establish her.

esv.text: And of Zion it shall be said, “This one and that one were born in her”; for the Most High himself will establish her.

cnv.text: 論到錫安，必有話說： “這一個、那一個都是生在錫安的。” 至高者必親自堅立這城。

ccb.text: 至于锡安，必有人说： “万族必成为城中的居民， 至高者必亲自坚立这城。”

csbs.text: 论到锡安，必有话说： “这一个、那一个都出生在其中。” 至高者必亲自坚立这城。
